Monkey Man, originally set for distribution by Netflix, was dropped by the streamer because “the portrayal of a fictional right-wing Hindu Nationalist character as Evil"

The trailer Shows Saffron colour flag to the evil political party (Hindu Nationalist BJP)

Local Police Led by Evil Police commissioner "RANA SINGH" kill and displace residents so that the land can be developed for a "RELIGIOUS CONSTRUCTION". "RANA SINGH" led the surge—and killed Kid’s(Hero's) mother

"RANA SINGH" is a patron of the famed spiritual leader "BABA SHAKTI"

"BABA SHAKTI" who’s supporting a "SAFFRON PARTY'S CANDIDATE'S run for office and facing criticism for his jingoistic rhetoric, as well as his forced expulsion of people in a rural locale in order to build a Hindu commune. 

BABA SHAKTI appears to be a clear stand-in for Yogi Adityanath, the ultra-right-wing nationalist Uttar Pradesh chief minister 

The events of Kid’s Childhood :- "HINDU NATIONALIST vigilantes entering myriad villages and tribal collectives, often by force, to terrorize residents and “Hinduize” the populations"

Employs poor hijra characters for a moral cause (at a time when Hindu nationalists have attempted to roll back Indian progress on LGBTQ+ rights) carries no small significance

Actress Sobhita Dhulipala plays a character of prostitute named "SITA"


I FOUND IT FUNNY AND INTRESTING THAT FEW WEEKS AGO RAHUL GANDHI SAID "THERE'S A WORD IN HINDUISM CALLED SHAKTI, WE ARE FIGHTING WITH SHAKTI AND WE HAVE TO DEFEAT SHAKTI"
